channel.title: THE SIGNAL // dated tech calls
channel.description: A self-grading public oracle. Dated, falsifiable tech calls, graded in public.

item.title: Devs are starring mattpocock/skills hard today. Betting it picks up a corporate backer o...
item.description: Devs are starring mattpocock/skills hard today. Betting it picks up a corporate backer or a managed-cloud offering within six months. // OPEN // LONGSHOT: WIN IF "MATTPOCOCK" RESURFACES BY 2026-07-18
